allow: Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\({deps: Object.keys\(p.dependencies||{}\), devDeps: Object.keys\(p.devDependencies||{}\)}, null, 2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; ['recharts', 'puppeteer', '@sparticuz/chromium', '@react-pdf/renderer', 'pdfkit'].forEach\(d => console.log\(d + ':', deps[d] || 'NOT INSTALLED'\)\)")
